name: Swiss Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 10.75 oz can cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray Crock-Pot with cooking spray.
2. Arrange chicken breasts in Crock-Pot.
3. Top with cheese, layering cheese if necessary.
4. Combine soup and milk; stir well.
5. Spoon over cheese.
6. Sprinkle with stuffing mix.
7. Drizzle melted margarine over stuffing mix.
8. Cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 6 hours.
Serves 6
